name: Cute Sitting Bunny
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a cute round cartoon bunny sitting upright with two tall ears pointing up, big friendly eyes, a tiny triangle nose, little whiskers, front paws together, and a fluffy round tail behind it

name: Floppy-Eared Lop Bunny
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a fluffy lop-eared rabbit with two long ears hanging softly down beside its cheeks, a plump rounded body, gentle sleepy eyes, a small twitchy nose, and a puff of a tail

name: Baby Bunny
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a tiny baby bunny curled up small with extra-big sparkly eyes, short little ears folded close to its head, a chubby fuzzy body, and a sweet shy smile, simple and adorable

name: Bunny With a Carrot
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a happy bunny holding a big carrot in both front paws and taking a nibble, leafy carrot top sticking up, cheeks rounded, ears perked, sitting on its back legs

name: Easter Bunny With Basket
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a cheerful Easter bunny standing upright holding a woven basket full of decorated eggs, a small bow at its neck, ears up tall, a few patterned eggs spilling near its feet

name: Bunny in a Flower Meadow
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a bunny hopping through a spring meadow surrounded by tall grass, daisies and tulips, a butterfly fluttering above, and a few rounded hills with a sun behind it

name: Hopping Bunny
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a bunny mid-hop leaping through the air with back legs stretched out behind and front paws tucked up, ears swept back from the motion, an excited open-mouthed smile

name: Bunny Face Close-Up
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a close-up portrait of a bunny's face filling the frame, two tall ears, large round eyes, a heart-shaped nose, soft fluffy cheeks and long whiskers fanning out to each side

name: Two Bunnies Together
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: two bunnies sitting close together side by side, one slightly taller, leaning their cheeks toward each other, both with perky ears and gentle smiles, a small flower between them

name: Bunny in the Garden
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a bunny peeking out from a vegetable garden between rows of leafy carrot tops and cabbages, a little wooden fence behind it, a watering can and a few pebbles nearby

name: Sleeping Bunny
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a cozy bunny curled into a soft ball fast asleep, eyes closed in two gentle curves, ears resting flat along its back, paws tucked under, a tiny sleep bubble above its nose

name: Bunny With a Spring Bouquet
subject: animals/bunny
prompt: a sweet bunny sitting up and holding a bundle of spring flowers like tulips and daisies in its front paws, ears tall, a happy smile, with a couple of fallen petals at its feet
